title: athyrium lewalleanum
intro: Athyrium lewalleanum, also known as Lewallen's lady fern, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, cough, and digestive issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Athyrium lewalleanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a herbal tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
